description_long: This is a historic stone fountain with a rectangular pedestal base and a decorative upper section. The front features an ornate arched alcove with a shell-like motif, above a rounded stone basin that projects outward to catch water. The structure is constructed from weathered stone blocks, with visible engravings and a bronze plaque on one side. The fountain is set into a paved platform with raised curbs and a small planted area containing greenery. The overall appearance suggests a classical or neoclassical style, with aged patina and moss indicating long-term outdoor exposure.
description: A classical stone fountain with an ornate arched alcove, projecting basin, engraved details, and a surrounding paved platform with greenery.
description_view_0: This view shows the engraved front face of the fountain, the projecting basin to the right, and the paved platform with a small planter behind.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the bronze plaque, the stone banding, and the greenery to the right of the fountain.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the pedestal, more of the planted area, and the absence of decorative features.
description_view_3: The ornate arched alcove and the main basin are fully visible, with the shell motif and the main interaction point of the fountain.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a shell-like motif within an arched alcove, classical stone banding, and engraved inscriptions. A bronze plaque is mounted on one side, and the stonework shows weathering and patina, adding to its historic character.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is a single, rounded stone bowl projecting from the front, with a thick rim and no visible tiering or compartments.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a paved platform with raised curbs and a small planted area containing green foliage.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears dry in all views.
